title: Focus on Behavior Near the Input
text: A limit depends on what happens near $$x=7$$, $$not$$ $$on$$ $$whether$$ $$the$$ $$original$$ $$function$$ $$is$$ $$defined$$ $$there$$.

title: Rewrite the Rational Function
text: For $$x\ne$$ $$7$$, $$the$$ $$expression$$ $$for$$ $$f(x)$$ simplifies to the same rule as $$g(x)$$.
